titleStmt.title: SII 27.182: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 182. (A.R. No. 1 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the second prākāra in the Raṅganātha temple.
This record registers a royal gift of a kirīṭa and karṇa-patra to god Raṅganātha of Śrīraṅgam, through Veṅgaḷayya, the rāyasaṁ of Rāmābhatlayya.
It is dated Śaka 1461, Viḷaṁbi, Pushya ba. 30, Sunday ardhōdaya, corresponding to 1539 A.D., January 19, Sunday, f.d.t. ·17. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastusvastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāyamanōbhayaṁkara bhāṣege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara pāṁḍiyarājya stāpanācārya śrī vīrapratāpa Acyutadēvamahārāyaru vijayanagaradalū pṛthvīrājyaṁguUtirddu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu . 1461 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 30 Ādivāra Ardhōdaya puṁṇyakāladalu śrīraṁgada śrīraṁganātha dēvarige taṁma ya vāgi samarpisida kirīṭa 1 ke ratnakuṁḍali voba pramāṇa
yī kirīṭavanū karnapatragaḷanū yī mūru svarūpa Ubhayaū Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi śrīraṁganātha dēvaru Avadharisi naḍeyauṁṭādu Eṁdu māḍida sēvege dharmasilāśāsana [.] śrīkriṣṇārppaṇamastu yī Ubhayagaḷanū rāmābhaṭlayyanavara rāyasaṁ veṁgaḷayyanu taṁdanu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
